message:
style: formatting cleanup and minor refinements across 43 platform crate modules

Reformat format! strings, match arms, assert! macros, function
signatures, and comment formatting to satisfy updated rustfmt rules.

Minor substantive changes:
- fcp-core/error.rs: Additional error variant.
- fcp-core/provisioning.rs: Type addition.
- fcp-host/tests/no_mock_integration.rs: Test expansion.
- fcp-manifest/lib.rs: Manifest type refinements.
- fcp-mesh/planner.rs: Planner adjustments.
- fcp-registry/lib.rs: Registry verification refinements.
- fcp-sdk/sigv4.rs: SigV4 signer formatting and improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
